title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXI. Tales.
content:
Tommy kept a chandler's shop,
        Richard went to buy a mop,
        Tommy gave him such a knock,
        That sent him out of his chandler's shop,
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. LXXI. Tales.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
